title: Hyperliquid payments with Cypher
summary_title: Cypher's prepaid Visa card: turning Hyperliquid perps into real-world spending
summary_description: Cypher launches on Hyperliquid with instant card loading from perps and spot balances, plus plans for merchant rewards and on-chain forex.

key_moments.label: Hyperliquid's abstracted HTTP API made integration smoother than typical blockchains
Cypher collapses multiple off-ramp steps into one-click card loading from perps balance
Virtual card live immediately after KYC; physical cards ship globally in weeks
Integration built on HyperCore API, not HyperEVM; abstracted signatures used like normal users
Supports HYPE, USDC, PER, BTC, ETH loading; community wanted PER from day one
Future: auto-load from HLP vault when balance drops below threshold
Merchant token and incentive protocol launching this year for cashback at Uber, Marriott
Users overpaid six figures in forex fees in Q1 2025 alone; Cypher alerts when to decline POS conversions

pull_quote: We collapse all these steps into a single step and make it instant. If you already have some spot or perps balance, with a click of a button, load it to Cypher instantly.
